TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Saruc, title = Saruc, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saruc} }

S.FORM: alang Saruc ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 154 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 151 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Saruc hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Saruc hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Saruc hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Saruc hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Saruc hya' ga Tgleq. tay 'llaw na Saruc hya' ga Twan nokan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Saruc ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 154 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 151 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Saruc hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Saruc hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Saruc hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Saruc hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Saruc hya' ga Tgleq. tay 'llaw na Saruc hya' ga Twan nokan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa tɣleq. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa twan nokan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
